title: Design System: Pedro Pascal Advent Calendar

display.purpose: Advent course logo, titles, and calendar headers only.

body.purpose: Course reading materials, steps, and general content copy.

motion.name: springy-scale
motion.purpose: Springy scale up and active door highlights.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Standard action button for proceeding in lessons or submitting quizzes.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #e0b020; color: #060914; font-family: 'Press Start 2P', Courier New, monospace; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; padding: 8px 16px; border: 2px solid #1a1f38; border-radius: 2px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), background-color 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #f5c842; transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-btn-primary { transition: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: none; } }

components.name: Advent Calendar Door
components.description: Standard calendar card grid component representing a single weekly lesson.
components.css: .ds-door { width: 120px; height: 120px; background: #111527; border: 2px solid #1a1f38; border-radius: 4px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 10px; font-family: 'Press Start 2P', Courier New, monospace; font-size: 9px; color: #a0a5b5; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-door-active { border-color: #e0b020; color: #e0b020; } .ds-door-active:hover { transform: scale(1.08); background: #171c36; } .ds-door-header { font-size: 8px; font-weight: 700; } .ds-door-icon { font-size: 24px; } .ds-door-footer { font-size: 7px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-door { transition: none; } .ds-door-active:hover { transform: none; } }

narrative.overview: A cozy pixel-art workspace focusing on build-and-learn, retro typography, and festive ornaments. The design layout is high-contrast, playful, and responsive, mimicking the aesthetics of a classic 8-bit holiday game.
keyCharacteristics: Monospace retro heading styles paired with highly readable sans-serif content text.
Solid color-tinted borders to denote container boundaries and interactive states.
High-energy micro-animations (springy scale-ups, bouncy door unlocks) that respect user reduced-motion preferences.

rules.name: The Contrast Spark Rule
rules.body: Bright accents (gold, jade, crimson) are used exclusively to guide the user's attention. Surfacing and structure must rely strictly on Navy tones to maintain visual comfort.

rules.name: The Monospace Accent Rule
rules.body: Monospace text is strictly reserved for short headers, status badges, buttons, and numeric counters. All paragraphs, descriptions, and long-form lesson content must use the sans-serif body stack.

rules.name: The Flat Layering Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Depth is established through distinct background fills and solid, color-tinted border lines. Do not use box-shadows or backdrop-filters.

dos: Do pair retro monospace headers with clean sans-serif body copy.
Do use flat, solid, color-tinted borders to group and layer elements.
Do add springy scale transitions to interactive buttons and doors, wrapping them in prefers-reduced-motion media query checks.
donts: Don't use a basic corporate SaaS admin template look with thin gray borders.
Don't use soft drop-shadows or glassmorphism/blurs.
